description_long: This is a stand-up pouch of Sencha Naturals Organic Everyday Matcha, a Japanese green tea powder. The packaging is predominantly a bright green color with white and yellow text, featuring a large image of matcha powder on the front. The front displays the product name, organic certification, and a non-GMO label, while the back provides detailed nutritional facts, preparation suggestions, and a map of Japan. The pouch is made of flexible plastic with a resealable top, designed to keep the contents fresh. The sides of the pouch are gusseted, allowing it to stand upright and expand as needed. The overall appearance is clean, modern, and visually appealing, with clear branding and product information.
description: A bright green, resealable stand-up pouch of Sencha Naturals Organic Everyday Matcha with clear branding and nutritional information. The packaging features a large matcha powder image and is designed for freshness and convenience.
description_view_0: The left side view shows the gusseted edge of the pouch with certification logos and a partial view of the front and back labels.
description_view_1: The back view displays the nutrition facts panel, preparation instructions, a map of Japan, and various certifications.
description_view_2: The right side view highlights the gusseted seam and a partial view of the nutrition facts and front label.
description_view_3: The front view prominently features the product name, matcha powder image, and certification logos on a bright green background.
attribute_brand_logo: The 'Sencha Naturals' brand logo is visible at the top center of the front view, featuring white text on a green background with a small leaf graphic.
attribute_flavor_indication: The front of the package clearly states '100% Japanese Green Tea Powder' and 'Matcha', with a large image of green matcha powder, indicating a green tea flavor.
attribute_nutritional_labeling: A nutrition facts panel is visible on the back of the package, listing calories, serving size, and other nutritional information.
attribute_promotional_graphics: The front of the package features certification logos such as 'USDA Organic' and 'Non-GMO Project Verified', but no special promotional graphics or mascots are present.
